problems_encountered.description: API returned 403 Forbidden when attempting to create virtual host with hostname 'eval-agent5-test.example.com'. This hostname may not be owned by the account or requires additional domain verification.

tool_response_summary: Tool executed but API returned 403 Forbidden. Cannot create virtual host without a verified, owned domain.
execution_notes: Virtual host creation requires an actual registered and verified domain. Using arbitrary hostnames like 'example.com' is not permitted by Mittwald API.
